headlines.title: President Trump arrives in China for high-stakes summit with Xi
headlines.description: President Trump was greeted in Beijing with a welcome ceremony ahead of his two-day summit with Chinese President Xi.

headlines.title: The Great Wall is being restored one brick at a time
headlines.description: BEIJING — Old Cheng was waiting patiently at the bottom of a steep mountain ridge as the minivans carrying our news team snaked their way through the Yan mountains to meet him.

headlines.title: Chinese EVs take the world by storm — except in the U.S.
headlines.description: China loves electric cars: making them, driving them and selling them to the rest of the world.

headlines.title: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?
headlines.description: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?

headlines.title: Trump arrives in China for Xi summit
headlines.description: Air Force One landed at Beijing Capital International Airport in China. Trump’s state visit includes a bilateral meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping. He is the first U.S. president to visit China since his last state visit in 2017 during his first term.

headlines.title: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China
headlines.description: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China

headlines.title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
headlines.description: The South Carolina Supreme Court has overturned Alex Murdaugh's double murder conviction and ordered a new trial in the killings of his wife and son. NBC News' Laura Jarrett reports on the court's decision and what comes next for Murdaugh.

headlines.title: Democrats turn to state legislative races to catch up in the redistricting battle
headlines.description: After a series of court rulings gave Republicans a decisive advantage in the national redistricting fight, Democrats’ options for a counterpunch before this year’s midterms are limited.

headlines.title: Utah grief author sentenced to life in prison in husband’s poisoning death
headlines.description: The Utah grief author convicted of murder after prosecutors said she laced her husband’s cocktail with a fatal dose of fentanyl was sentenced to life in prison without parole on what would have been his 44th birthday.

headlines.title: Alabama jail staff didn’t help when she went into labor — other inmates did, lawsuit says
headlines.description: In a state with a long history of arresting pregnant women, one mom in custody says she was left to fend for herself.

headlines.title: States Reporting Potential Hantavirus Exposure Grows to 16
headlines.description: Sixteen states are reporting potential hantavirus exposures, including Minnesota, Kansas and Washington state. Health officials say most of the cases involve people who left the cruise ship at the center of an outbreak before it was identified or others who traveled with exposed passengers. They say all are asymptomatic and isolating at home. NBC’s Maggie Vespa reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Vance: Trump answer on Americans’ finances a ‘misrepresentation’
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance responds to a question from NBC News’ Monica Alba about whether he agrees with President Trump’s comments on Tuesday that Trump doesn’t think about Americans’ financial situations in making decisions around the Iran war.
